coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the single-group, 13-node graph.
materialParity: The complete 21,840-index result uses the strict flat.nodes Attribute/Emission graph. Its evaluated soup contains neither col nor power, so Blender resolves both missing Geometry Attribute outputs independently to zero; Emission Color and Strength therefore produce black. The authored browser route now preserves that result instead of substituting diagnostic green, while flat.nodes assets carrying both fields retain their existing attribute-driven emission shader.
validation: Exact Blender topology and four-decimal bounds across five cases covering the authored result, two dot distances, and two dot sizes. Collection Info reproduces the evaluated period-pack collection children and their authored transforms.
